items.title: Cash App lets users send USDC stablecoins on chains like Solana and Ethereum
items.whyYouShouldCare: Cash App's integration of USDC on Solana enhances liquidity options and could drive more users to the Solana ecosystem.

items.title: Building for the $400B+ Sports Industry on Solana
items.whyYouShouldCare: Targeting the $400B sports industry positions Solana as a key player in a lucrative market, potentially increasing user engagement and ecosystem growth.

items.title: Orca, Streamex roll out secondary trading infrastructure for tokenized securities
items.whyYouShouldCare: The launch of secondary trading infrastructure by Orca and Streamex could improve market efficiency and attract institutional interest in Solana-based tokenized securities.
